untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of seasonal calendar patterns and multi-year historical seasonal bias confirmation (4+ of 5 years). These require external seasonal data, calendar-date logic, and historical seasonal analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators are price/technical only and cannot express: (1) 'current date falls within seasonal window ±5 days', (2) 'historical seasonal directional bias confirmed in 4+ of last 5 years', or (3) seasonal peak/trough detection. A seasonal pattern detector or external seasonal regime input would be required.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires a seasonal calendar module and multi-year historical seasonal pattern analysis. The entry conditions explicitly reference calendar dates, historical seasonal windows, and multi-year agreement thresholds that cannot be expressed using only current-bar price/technical indicators. A price structure confirmation (higher lows in uptrend) was approximated with SMA comparison, but this does not capture the core seasonal logic. Recommend implementing a separate seasonal regime or external seasonal indicator input.
